streams.shortDescription: Employer-supported skilled work pathway to explore in British Columbia.

hardRequirements.label: Job offer reported
hardRequirements.blockerText: No job offer was reported, which can limit employer-driven options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Do you currently have a job offer from a BC employer?

hardRequirements.label: Job located in British Columbia
hardRequirements.blockerText: Your job location does not appear to be in British Columbia.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Which province is your job located in?

hardRequirements.label: Full-time role
hardRequirements.blockerText: The role does not appear to be full-time, which can limit employer-driven options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Is your job offer full-time (30+ hours/week)?

hardRequirements.label: Permanent/ongoing role
hardRequirements.blockerText: The job offer appears temporary, which can reduce fit for employer-driven options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Is your job offer permanent/ongoing (no end date)?

hardRequirements.label: Occupation appears skilled (TEER 0-3)
hardRequirements.blockerText: Your occupation appears to be in a lower TEER category, which can limit skilled worker options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Do you know your NOC code or TEER level?

hardRequirements.label: Language readiness confirmed
hardRequirements.blockerText: Valid language results are not confirmed yet, which can limit readiness.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Do you have a valid language test result (or a booked test date)?

whyRules.text: You reported a job located in BC, which can support BC-specific employer pathways.
You reported a job offer, which is commonly used to support employer-driven options.
Your occupation appears to fall in a skilled TEER category (0-3).
Your employer may support nomination steps, which can matter for employer-supported pathways.

missingPrompts.prompt: Do you know your NOC code or TEER level?
Is your job offer full-time (30+ hours/week)?
Is your job offer permanent/ongoing (no end date)?
Do you have a valid language test result (or a booked test date)?

streams.shortDescription: Graduate-focused pathway to explore for those with recent Canadian study ties.

hardRequirements.label: Canadian education reported
hardRequirements.blockerText: Canadian education was not reported, which can limit graduate options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Did you complete a program in Canada?

hardRequirements.label: Public institution
hardRequirements.blockerText: Your institution appears private, which can reduce fit for some graduate options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Was your institution public or private?

hardRequirements.label: Program length 8+ months
hardRequirements.blockerText: Program length appears under 8 months, which can limit graduate options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Was your program at least 8 months long?

hardRequirements.label: Graduated within last 3 years
hardRequirements.blockerText: Graduation recency appears outside 3 years, which can reduce fit for graduate options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Did you graduate within the last 3 years?

hardRequirements.label: BC study/work tie
hardRequirements.blockerText: No clear British Columbia study/work tie was found, which can limit BC-specific graduate options.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Which province did you study in (or where is your job located)?

hardRequirements.label: Language readiness confirmed
hardRequirements.blockerText: Valid language results are not confirmed yet, which can limit readiness.
hardRequirements.missingPrompt: Do you have a valid language test result (or a booked test date)?

whyRules.text: You reported education in Canada, which can support graduate-focused options.
Your institution appears public, which can strengthen graduate pathways.
You indicated a BC study/work tie, which helps for BC-specific options.

missingPrompts.prompt: Was your institution public or private?
Was your program at least 8 months long?
Did you graduate within the last 3 years?
Do you have a valid language test result (or a booked test date)?
